narrative:
Precinct Maumee 5 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.5 percentage points.
